DOC_NAME: Guidelines for Rogi Kalyan Samities in Public Health Facilities
title: Capacity Building of Members
heading: 5.1 Capacity Building of Members
text:
Section
Capacity Building of Members
05
Capacity building of RKS should be a continuous Proposed Infrastructure, Area of Improvement and
process. The knowledge base of members needs to Role of RKS, roles and responsibilities of various staffs,
be strengthened for a clear understanding of the Incentive and Award, Functionality and its Assessment,
objectives, functioning and roles of RKS. Orientation Resource Mobilization and Fund Management, Hospital
programme should be organized on yearly basis to Management and Facility Development, Monitoring of
provide policy updates to the members of RKS. Hospital services, Introduction of other Health services-
AYUSH, NCD, NRC, Convergence between different
RKS members should be oriented on District’s/SDHs/
Programmes, Patient rights and citizen charter, Quality
CHCs/PHCs area profile, Public Health System in
assurance and Accountability and Governance.
India – NHM and Its Objective, Availability of Services,
Guidelines for Rogi Kalyan Samities in Public Health Facilities 15

Grievance Redressal Mechanism
06

with a nominated person preferably from reputed in a format which will include the name, date of
NGO/CSO and a dedicated landline number and receipt of grievance and specific complaint and
email id which is to be displayed in each facility. action taken.

a complaint even after leaving the premises of approaching appropriate responsible authority/
hospital. Officer.

Section
Awards to Best Performing RKS
07
States can reward those RKS that deliver high quality facility, community participation, and provision of
performance. Funding for these rewards can be sought health services, quality of care and level of patient
under the NHM. Performance of RKS can be assessed satisfaction.
